name: gitleaks-github-secret-scanner
title: Gitleaks Cloud — GitHub API Key Hunter & Secret Scanner
description: Hunt leaked API keys across GitHub. Pick a known platform (30 services: Razorpay, Stripe, AWS, OpenAI, Anthropic + more), a keyword (we expand variants), or paste a custom regex. Scan a repo, an org, or all of GitHub. With a GitHub PAT, fast Code Search unlocks. Smart key-secret pairing.
